identity: Human male bard, charming grin, shoulder-length wavy chestnut hair, light beard, hazel eyes, slim build.
outfit: Rich burgundy-and-gold embroidered doublet over a cream puffy-sleeved shirt, brown leather belt with a pouch, dark trousers, tall riding boots. A wide-brimmed feathered hat with a long red feather.
weapons: A wooden lute slung across the back on a strap; a thin rapier at the hip in a decorative scabbard, not drawn.
attackStyle: East-facing. Lute swung around in both hands and strummed mid-air, notes of golden musical energy flaring outward.
spellStyle: East-facing. Lute held in both hands, strumming, floating golden musical notes swirling around his head.
blockStyle: East-facing. Lute held horizontally across the torso as a shield, hat tipped forward. Confident smirk.
koStyle: East-facing, fallen on his back, lute fallen beside him, hat dropped nearby. Arms splayed.
southStyle: Facing camera (south), cocky showman idle. Lute held at the hip, one hand strumming, feathered hat tipped.
portraitStyle: Bust shot from mid-chest up, three-quarter view. Charming face, feathered hat, embroidered doublet visible on shoulders.

referenceSheet.prompt:
IDENTITY (this image becomes the canonical identity anchor — preserve in every downstream frame): Human male bard, charming grin, shoulder-length wavy chestnut hair, light beard, hazel eyes, slim build.

OUTFIT: Rich burgundy-and-gold embroidered doublet over a cream puffy-sleeved shirt, brown leather belt with a pouch, dark trousers, tall riding boots. A wide-brimmed feathered hat with a long red feather.

WEAPONS: A wooden lute slung across the back on a strap; a thin rapier at the hip in a decorative scabbard, not drawn.

CLASS: humanoid. Full-body view, head to feet visible. Character occupies ~70% of the canvas height. Feet aligned near the bottom; headroom above.

POSE: full-body side profile facing right (east), calm combat-ready idle. Head up, eyes visible. NOT a portrait bust, NOT a close-up — entire character from head to feet.

STYLE: detailed pixel art with clean readable silhouette, warm pixel-art palette, transparent background, no ground shadow.

portrait.prompt:
IDENTITY (must match reference sheet exactly): Human male bard, charming grin, shoulder-length wavy chestnut hair, light beard, hazel eyes, slim build.

OUTFIT: Rich burgundy-and-gold embroidered doublet over a cream puffy-sleeved shirt, brown leather belt with a pouch, dark trousers, tall riding boots. A wide-brimmed feathered hat with a long red feather.

WEAPONS: A wooden lute slung across the back on a strap; a thin rapier at the hip in a decorative scabbard, not drawn.

POSE (portrait): Bust shot from mid-chest up, three-quarter view. Charming face, feathered hat, embroidered doublet visible on shoulders.

FRAMING: bust shot from mid-chest up, three-quarter view, centered in a 256x256 canvas, shoulders fill the lower third.

SCALE (non-negotiable): character must occupy approximately 180px of the 256px canvas height — roughly 70%. Do NOT stretch or upscale. Extra space above head and/or below feet is correct.

STYLE: pixel art, transparent background, no ground shadow, no borders, no text. Match the palette and style of the reference sheet.

NEGATIVE: do not add weapons or props not listed in WEAPONS. Do not change palette, species, or outfit from the reference sheet. Do not zoom in — respect SCALE.
